use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and dialogs
Navigation actions with ghost and link variants
Icon-only buttons for toolbars and action bars
Secondary actions alongside primary CTA buttons
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for variant management, and standard Tailwind CSS for styling. Features accessible focus states, disabled handling, and asChild prop support for polymorphic rendering.
